faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: Wantagh homeowners most frequently encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and jumping spiders. Occasionally, yellow sac spiders and orb weavers are found in gardens and around outdoor lighting. While most local spiders are harmless, they can become a nuisance when populations grow indoors.
